reviews.comment:
La estacion de servicio bien, le falta un poco mas de comida. El restauran se come normal abundante, La atención muy mala y cierra muy temprano para estar en La ruta. El alojamiento bueno, pero en La rotonda hay un alojamiento nuevo muy lindo y muy comodo.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station is okay, but it could use a bit more food. The restaurant has decent, plentiful food, but the service is very poor and it closes too early for being on the highway. The accommodation is good, but there's a new, very nice, and comfortable place to stay near the roundabout.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnNnNiaDBnRRAB
